title: Cheesy Bake Polish Pierogi Casserole
description: A hearty, umami Polish dish featuring pierogi, cheese slices, and cured meats, all baked to perfection. Perfect for meal prep and low-calorie diets.

ingredients.name: Cured sausage (such as kielbasa or knockwurst)

instructions: Cook pierogi according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook sliced sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of cooked pierogi.
Top with a layer of cooked sausage, then a layer of sliced cheese.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Drizzle with beaten egg and low-fat milk (if using).
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
